product_description: Business vehicle leasing/rental for single vehicles through to fleets, with maintenance options available.
availability_evidence: WesBank states that businesses can rent different types of business vehicles, with a maintenance option or otherwise, from single vehicles to entire fleets.
notes_uncertainties: Phase 3 should separate maintenance and non-maintenance variants if evidence supports it.

product_description: Fleet solution covering funding, procurement, management and disposals.
availability_evidence: WesBank publishes fleet solutions covering fleet funding, procurement, fleet management and disposals.
notes_uncertainties: Product boundaries need validation because the page groups several services under fleet solutions.

product_type: Full maintenance rental / full-maintenance lease equivalent
product_description: Finance and maintenance package for vehicle use over a specified period and distance without taking ownership responsibility.
availability_evidence: Standard Bank describes Full Maintenance Rental as a comprehensive finance and maintenance package without ownership and states customers pay for use over a specified period and kilometres.
notes_uncertainties: Provider uses rental wording; included as close equivalent to full-maintenance lease.

product_description: Rental option that excludes maintenance management.
availability_evidence: Standard Bank states that customers can choose the Operating Rental option if they want to exclude maintenance management.
notes_uncertainties: Captured from Full Maintenance Rental page rather than a separate product page.

target_customer: Business customers financing vehicles or movable assets
product_description: Absa purchases the asset and the customer leases it, with options at the end of the lease period.
availability_evidence: Absa states that with finance lease it purchases an asset and the customer leases it from Absa, with an option to buy at the end of the lease period.
notes_uncertainties: Applies to movable assets including vehicles; vehicle-specific terms should be validated in contract/product brochures.

product_description: Lease agreement giving full use of the vehicle for the lease period with repayment options.
availability_evidence: Absa comparison page lists Operating Lease Agreement and says it provides full use of the vehicle for the lease period.
notes_uncertainties: Maintenance inclusion not established from this source.

product_description: Lease product that combines vehicle use with maintenance services.
availability_evidence: Absa business vehicle and asset finance pages disclose full maintenance leases among available packages.
notes_uncertainties: Detailed public product page not found in this pass; confirm current terms before functionality extraction.

target_customer: Commercial vehicle fleet owners and logistics/fleet customers
product_description: Full maintenance leasing across vehicle classes, including acquisition, maintenance and fleet administration support.
commercial_model: Fixed monthly lease payment; maintenance, servicing and tyres included
availability_evidence: Eqstra states that full maintenance leasing manages the expenses of acquiring, maintaining and administering a vehicle fleet and includes maintenance, servicing and tyre replacements in the monthly lease payment.
notes_uncertainties: No separate operating lease product confirmed on current official page in this pass.

product_description: Lease product with fixed costs and comprehensive vehicle management coverage.
commercial_model: Full maintenance lease; fixed monthly costs
availability_evidence: Merchant West states its Full Maintenance Lease covers a fixed period or mileage and includes procurement, maintenance and disposal support.
notes_uncertainties: Some duplicate Merchant West URLs exist; this record uses the current official page found in search.

product_description: Lease for using vehicles over an agreed term with fixed monthly rentals and no residual risk at the end.
availability_evidence: Merchant West states that an Operating Lease lets a business use vehicles for an agreed term, typically 12 to 60 months, with fixed rentals and no residual risk.

product_description: Structured lease-to-own solution where the business uses vehicles during the term and takes ownership at the end after payments are complete.
availability_evidence: Merchant West describes Dynamic Lease as a lease-to-own structure with ownership transferring after all contractual payments are made.
notes_uncertainties: Maintenance and tyres are customer responsibility according to provider FAQ.

product_description: Outsourced fleet purchasing and management solution where Avis Fleet supports vehicle sourcing and fleet lifecycle services.
commercial_model: Full maintenance lease / outsourced fleet management
availability_evidence: Avis Fleet lists Full Maintenance Lease as an offering and positions it around outsourcing fleet purchasing and management.
notes_uncertainties: Specific term and cost structure not found on public summary page.

target_customer: Public and private sector fleet customers
product_description: Comprehensive vehicle leasing solution with fixed rentals over a predetermined period where FleetAfrica takes ownership, maintenance and residual value risks.
availability_evidence: FleetAfrica describes Full Maintenance Lease as a comprehensive vehicle leasing solution with fixed rentals and says it takes ownership, maintenance and residual value risks.

product_description: NedFleet specialty product for leased fleets with maintenance bundled.
availability_evidence: NedFleet states its speciality is Full Maintenance Leasing and Operating Rentals.
notes_uncertainties: Public page appears old; current brand relationship with Eqstra/Nedbank requires validation.

product_description: Operating rental product disclosed by NedFleet.
availability_evidence: NedFleet states its speciality is Full Maintenance Leasing and Operating Rentals.
notes_uncertainties: Public page appears old; validate current availability before detailed extraction.

product_description: Bidvest Bank purchases required fleet vehicles and builds related products and services into the fleet finance solution.
availability_evidence: Bidvest Bank fleet finance page lists Full Maintenance lease and says the bank purchases fleet vehicles based on business requirements.

product_description: Fleet lifecycle management service covering operational fleet information and management needs.
availability_evidence: Bidvest Bank says its fleet management system collects information related to vehicle roadworthiness, tyre health, fuel and driver behaviour.
notes_uncertainties: Included because it is offered by a confirmed lease provider; functionality details belong in Phase 3.

product_description: Fleet solution enabling businesses to buy, lease or rent fleet vehicles through CFAO Mobility South Africa.
commercial_model: Buy / lease / rent; flexible leasing and finance
availability_evidence: CFAO Mobility states customers can buy, lease or rent fleet vehicles and lists flexible leasing and finance options.
notes_uncertainties: Phase 2 cannot confirm whether CFAO is the principal lessor or an arranging/dealer-channel provider in every case.

target_customer: Companies and owner-operator drivers in logistics/e-hailing/delivery models
product_description: Subscription-based vehicle leasing programme designed to enable owner-operator logistics operations.
availability_evidence: Pace Fleet Services describes itself as a South African car leasing company specialising in subscription-based Owner-Operator Programmes.
notes_uncertainties: Product may differ from conventional corporate fleet leasing; keep as close lease-like provider.

product_description: Flexible monthly car leasing product with online profile creation and preconfigured offers.
commercial_model: Monthly lease; no balloon payments or large deposits advertised
availability_evidence: Avis iLease advertises flexible monthly car leasing in South Africa with no balloon payments, large deposits or hidden costs.
notes_uncertainties: Insurance and inclusion details should be validated per offer before functionality extraction.

target_customer: Commercial truck and logistics fleet customers
product_description: Full maintenance rental product for commercial vehicles with maintenance and support over yearly periods.
availability_evidence: Imperial Truck Rental says it provides Full Maintenance Rentals over various yearly periods, including maintenance, servicing and support.
notes_uncertainties: Provider uses rental wording; included as commercial full-maintenance lease equivalent.

target_customer: Commercial truck and logistics fleet customers
product_description: Operating lease option for logistics and fleet requirements, with flexible structures aligned to business use.
availability_evidence: Imperial Truck Rental states it expanded its offering to include full maintenance rentals and operating leases.

product_description: Truck leasing product with vehicle finance and maintenance packages.
availability_evidence: Spartan Truck Hire states its fleet leasing and management division provides vehicle finance and maintenance packages to corporate and commercial enterprises.

product_description: Full maintenance lease option for commercial vehicle fleets across vehicle categories.
availability_evidence: Value Logistics states vehicles are available on flexible rental structures including daily, weekly, monthly and full maintenance lease options.

product_description: Complete truck leasing and management service providing financing and maintenance packages.
availability_evidence: Power Truck Hire states it offers a complete truck leasing and management service providing financing and maintenance packages.

product_description: Full-maintenance leasing and specialised vehicle support service for truck customers.
availability_evidence: Elite Truck Hire states it offers short-term rentals, full-maintenance leasing and specialised vehicle support services nationwide.
notes_uncertainties: Detailed product terms not found on public page.

product_description: Full maintenance lease solution for public sector vehicles incorporating acquisition, maintenance, disposal and replacement.
commercial_model: Full maintenance lease for fixed period
availability_evidence: g-FleeT states its Full Maintenance Lease solution incorporates vehicle acquisition, maintenance, disposal and replacement of a vehicle leased for a fixed period.
notes_uncertainties: Public sector scope; not generally available to all commercial customers.

target_customer: Public and private sector fleet customers
product_description: Comprehensive leasing and fleet management services tailored to fleet cost reduction.
availability_evidence: Vuswa states that it provides cost-effective, comprehensive leasing and fleet management services to the public and private sectors.
notes_uncertainties: Public source is high-level and does not disclose specific lease product names.

product_description: Fixed monthly rental product for a vehicle chosen from a needs analysis, used over an agreed period and distance, then returned to Fleet Horizon.
commercial_model: Full maintenance lease; fixed monthly rental
availability_evidence: Fleet Horizon states its Full Maintenance Lease allows the client to choose a vehicle for an agreed period and distance at a fixed monthly rental, with the asset returned at contract end.

product_name: Customised Leasing and Fleet Management Solutions
product_description: Customised leasing and fleet management solution based on operating conditions and monthly utilisation.
availability_evidence: U-Rent states that it offers customised leasing and fleet management solutions based on business needs, vehicle operating conditions and expected monthly utilisation.
notes_uncertainties: Specific lease product variants are not named publicly.

target_customer: Fleet management customers, including government and municipal sector users
product_description: Standalone or integrated fleet solution with rent-or-lease listed as part of fleet management services.
commercial_model: Rent or lease; fleet management service
availability_evidence: Amasondo lists fleet solutions including Rent or lease, fuel optimisation, driver solutions and maintenance solutions.
notes_uncertainties: Product name is generic and detailed leasing terms are not publicly disclosed in the reviewed source.

product_description: Business vehicle lease with predictable monthly payments and essential maintenance included.
commercial_model: Full maintenance lease; predictable monthly payments; essential maintenance included
availability_evidence: Merchant West Namibia states its Full Maintenance Lease avoids tying up capital, offers predictable monthly payments and covers all essential maintenance.

product_description: Usage-based operating lease where the customer can manage maintenance and tyre costs itself or outsource them to Merchant West.
commercial_model: Operating lease; usage-based contract; optional outsourced maintenance and tyre-cost management
availability_evidence: Merchant West Namibia states its Operating Lease improves cash flow through a usage-based contract and can include outsourced maintenance and tyre-cost management.

target_customer: Business fleet customers wanting flexible end-of-term purchase optionality
product_description: Flexible lease-to-own option with the ability to purchase the vehicle at an agreed price at the end of the term with no obligation.
commercial_model: Dynamic lease / lease-to-own; agreed end-of-term purchase option
availability_evidence: Merchant West Namibia states the Dynamic Lease offers a lease-to-own option and can be adjusted during the term.

product_type: Full maintenance rental / full-maintenance lease equivalent
target_customer: Fleet drivers and employer-managed vehicle fleets in Namibia
product_description: Full Maintenance Rental product covering vehicle finance, maintenance, servicing, tyre replacement, licensing and traffic fine management.
commercial_model: Full maintenance rental with finance and selected lifecycle services included subject to employer contract
availability_evidence: The Omatemba driver pack states that Omatemba finances the vehicle under its Full Maintenance Rental product and that FMR covers finance, maintenance, servicing, tyre replacement, vehicle licensing and traffic fine management.
notes_uncertainties: Some services are subject to what the employer selected or contracted.

provider_name: Bank Windhoek Vehicle and Asset Finance
target_customer: Individuals and businesses financing vehicles in Namibia
product_description: Vehicle and asset finance option that allows customers to lease a vehicle for up to 60 months.
commercial_model: Financial lease; first instalment as deposit; lease term up to 60 months
availability_evidence: Bank Windhoek public evidence states its Financial Leasing option lets customers lease a vehicle for up to 60 months with a first instalment as deposit payable on contract signature.
notes_uncertainties: Detailed fleet-management inclusions are not publicly visible in the captured official page.

product_type: Full-service operating leasing / fleet management service
target_customer: Business and fleet customers in Namibia and other Avis Leasing markets
product_description: Fleet leasing and fleet management propositions including full-service operating leasing, fleet management as a service and flexible lease options.
commercial_model: Full-service operating lease / fleet management as a service; market-specific offering
availability_evidence: Avis Leasing states that full-service operating leasing, fleet management as a service and flexible lease options are offered in many global markets and its service forms list Namibia as a selectable market.
notes_uncertainties: Namibia-specific scope should be confirmed with Avis Fleet; public evidence is global plus Namibia market listing.

target_customer: Individuals and businesses needing vehicles for weeks, months or longer
product_description: Long-term mobility solution often referred to as a mini lease, with flexible rental terms and a range of vehicle classes.
commercial_model: Long-term rental / mini lease; daily-from pricing and monthly rental economics for 30+ days
availability_evidence: First Car Rental Namibia states its long-term car rental services are often referred to as a mini lease and are available for a few weeks, months or longer.
notes_uncertainties: Not a conventional fleet operating lease; included as close lease-like long-term mobility.

target_customer: Business and personal customers needing monthly vehicle access
product_description: Monthly vehicle rental packages with maintenance, roadside assistance, cover, mileage allowance and vehicle group pricing.
commercial_model: Monthly rental; published monthly rates; 3,000 km/month; cover and roadside assistance included
availability_evidence: SANI SIXT Namibia publishes monthly rental solutions and terms including super cover, maintenance, 24-hour roadside assistance, 3,000 km per month and courtesy vehicle during service.
notes_uncertainties: Available to credit-card customers and subject to availability according to the published terms.

target_customer: Corporate clients, projects and business travellers in Namibia
product_description: Corporate rental and leasing service with project-based or long-term rentals, flexible terms, vehicle monitoring and special leasing rates for multi-month needs.
commercial_model: Corporate rental / special leasing rates; pay-as-you-use and customised payment terms available
availability_evidence: Kalahari Car Hire says corporate customers can rent or lease a car, offers project-based or long-term rentals, flexible rental terms and special leasing rates and service for vehicles needed for a couple of months.
notes_uncertainties: Public page is corporate rental oriented; exact lease contract structure is not disclosed.
